# Chapter 15: Signal processing  (~110 pp)
- 15.1 Continuous- and discrete-time signals (10) · 15.2 Fourier analysis (18) · 15.3 Sampling and reconstruction revisited from Volume I (12) · 15.4 Filters: FIR, IIR, design (18) · 15.5 Time-frequency analysis (15) · 15.6 Compression: DCT, wavelets (15) · 15.7 Modern audio, image, video coding overview (12) · 15.8 Failure section: aliasing, ringing, lossy-compression artifacts in safety-critical systems (10)

**Archetype**: transport, interface. **Project**: design and implement a digital filter; characterise its response. **Exercises**: 35.
